Citation
========

If you use **stengression** in your research or find it helpful for your work, please cite our paper.

Plain Text
----------
Pathak, R., & Chakraborty, T. (2026). Deep Generative Spatiotemporal Engression for Probabilistic Forecasting of Epidemics. arXiv preprint arXiv:2603.07108.

BibTeX
------
.. code-block:: bibtex

   @article{pathak2026deep,
     title={Deep Generative Spatiotemporal Engression for Probabilistic Forecasting of Epidemics},
     author={Pathak, Rajdeep and Chakraborty, Tanujit},
     journal={arXiv preprint arXiv:2603.07108},
     year={2026}
   }
